Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /Users/ertugrulsahin/Codalio/demo-project-v4/booking-app/app/policies/service_policy.rb:
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class ServicePolicy < Rhino::ResourcePolicy
     4	  self.resource_slug = 'services'
     5	
     6	  def permitted_attributes_for_show(user)
     7	    return ['*'] if has_role?(user, 'owner') || has_role?(user, 'admin') || has_role?(user, 'staff')
     8	    return ['id', 'name', 'description', 'duration_minutes', 'price', 'status'] if has_role?(user, 'customer')
     9	    []
    10	  end
    11	def hidden_attributes_for_show(user)
    12	  []
    13	end
    14	  def permitted_attributes_for_create(user)
    15	    return ['*'] if has_role?(user, 'owner') || has_role?(user, 'admin') || has_role?(user, 'staff')
    16	    []
    17	  end
    18	  def permitted_attributes_for_update(user)
    19	    return ['*'] if has_role?(user, 'owner') || has_role?(user, 'admin')
    20	    return ['name', 'description', 'duration_minutes', 'price'] if has_role?(user, 'staff')
    21	    []
    22	  end
    23	end
